title: nilgirianthus papillosus
intro: Nilgirianthus papillosus, also known as Nilgiri hairplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus papillosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
